message:
test(perf): improve browser environment detection in bundle budget tests

Enhance the puppeteer/Chrome detection patterns to catch more error scenarios:
- Add case-insensitive 'puppeteer' matching
- Detect cdp/ paths from Chromium DevTools Protocol errors
- Catch CallbackRegistry and CdpPage errors
- Detect estimo package errors (used by size-limit)

This ensures the test gracefully skips in more headless environments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
